calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories; Request For Production From Bicycle Tools Incorporated, And For Order Establishing Admissions, And Request For Sanctions.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher F. Tuttle, The Chanler Group, appearing for Plaintiff Peter Englander, Telephone (510)848-8880;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S motion to compel responses to special interrogatories, form interrogatories, request for production, and for an order establishing admissions is granted. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted. No opposition was filed. Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Melinda T. Derish; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
